channel.title: Donna's YouTube Audio
channel.description: YouTube channels converted to podcast audio by Donna
channel.itunes:author: Donna

item.title: I Set Up a Claude Code Operating System for 6 Founders in 8 Hours
item.description:
Liam Ottley: Apply for the AIOS Mastermind → https://bit.ly/ct-aios-mastermind 📈 Get daily AIOS Workshops from me in my Accelerator: https://bit.ly/4luNjLX 🤝 Ready to transform your business with AI? Let's talk: https://bit.ly/47xTiK8 📚 Join the #1 community for AI entrepreneurs: https://bit.ly/4saZv70
In this video, I set up a Claude Code AI Operating System for 6 non-technical founders at a private mastermind in Cape Town — in a single day. You'll see how complete beginners with zero coding experience
item.itunes:author: Liam Ottley
